name: Daisho Co.,Ltd.
summary: Daisho Co.,Ltd. produces and sells dipping sauce, soup, and seasoning ingredients in Japan. The company offers sauces, salt-pepper seasonings, soup mixes, pork stomach soup mixes, salad dressings, green vegetable juices, and other blended seasoning products. It also exports its products to Hong Kong, China, and North America. The company was formerly known as Daisho Shokuhin Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Daisho Co.,Ltd. in April 1994. Daisho Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
